데살로니가후서 2:1.content: Now, brothers, concerning the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ and our gathering together to him, we ask you

데살로니가후서 2:2.content: not to be quickly shaken in your mind, and not be troubled, either by spirit, or by word, or by letter as if from us, saying that the day of Christ has already come.

데살로니가후서 2:3.content: Let no one deceive you in any way. For it will not be, unless the rebellion comes first, and the man of sin is revealed, the son of destruction,

데살로니가후서 2:4.content: he who opposes and exalts himself against all that is called God or that is worshiped, so that he sits as God in the temple of God, setting himself up as God.

데살로니가후서 2:5.content: Don’t you remember that, when I was still with you, I told you these things?

데살로니가후서 2:6.content: Now you know what is restraining him, to the end that he may be revealed in his own season.

데살로니가후서 2:7.content: For the mystery of lawlessness already works. Only there is one who restrains now, until he is taken out of the way.

데살로니가후서 2:8.content: Then the lawless one will be revealed, whom the Lord will kill with the breath of his mouth, and destroy by the manifestation of his coming;

데살로니가후서 2:9.content: even he whose coming is according to the working of Satan with all power and signs and lying wonders,

데살로니가후서 2:10.content: and with all deception of wickedness for those who are being lost, because they didn’t receive the love of the truth, that they might be saved.

데살로니가후서 2:11.content: Because of this, God sends them a working of error, that they should believe a lie;

데살로니가후서 2:12.content: that they all might be judged who didn’t believe the truth, but had pleasure in unrighteousness.

데살로니가후서 2:13.content: But we are bound to always give thanks to God for you, brothers loved by the Lord, because God chose you from the beginning for salvation through sanctification of the Spirit and belief in the truth,

데살로니가후서 2:14.content: to which he called you through our Good News, for the obtaining of the glory of our Lord Jesus Christ.

데살로니가후서 2:15.content: So then, brothers, stand firm and hold the traditions which you were taught by us, whether by word or by letter.

데살로니가후서 2:16.content: Now our Lord Jesus Christ himself, and God our Father, who loved us and gave us eternal comfort and good hope through grace,

데살로니가후서 2:17.content: comfort your hearts and establish you in every good work and word.
